response.original_title: Demanding Justice: A History of Domestic Workers
response.overview: Begin learning this history with this short film — Demanding Justice: A History of Domestic Workers. Here we trace the history of multiracial domestic worker organizing in the United States, from workers’ everyday acts of rebellion to their collective and large-scale forms of organizing. Spanning the 1600s to today, this film provides an overview of the history in the timeline. We recommend that you start here, and then explore the stories that interest you more fully in the timeline.
response.title: Demanding Justice: A History of Domestic Workers
